data_quality_audit.reason: WebFetch summarization on blocked/error pages (403/404) was observed fabricating plausible-sounding bookmaker odds. One source object (polymarket.corners_market) was directly disproven this session via the real gamma-api (only 3 markets exist for this event). All sources below are now tagged with a 'verification' field.

verification_levels.VERIFIED_API: Direct structured API/JSON response (Smarkets API, Pinnacle guest API, Polymarket gamma-api) or a direct successful page fetch (jina.ai reader proxy returning real rendered content) - treat as real.
verification_levels.UNVERIFIED_SEARCH_SUMMARY: Obtained only via WebSearch result snippets or a WebFetch summary of a page that may not have loaded correctly. Plausible but not independently re-confirmed. DO NOT count as an independent corroborating source for sources_count - context/color only.
verification_levels.DISPROVEN_REMOVED: Actively contradicted by a VERIFIED_API check this session; entry deleted from this file.

removed_entries: polymarket.corners_market (Over/Under 11 total combined corners) - DISPROVEN: gamma-api for slug fifwc-can-bih-2026-06-12 returns only 3 markets total (CAN win / Draw / BIH win). This sub-market does not exist.
kalshi_extended.corners_partial (RotoWire 'Over 4.5 corners -130' reference) - self-flagged in prior session as unconfirmed/ambiguous source; removed rather than carried forward as a gap-filler.

27a8f2b6-2220-4065-a3e1-acd4899fad9b.question: Will Canada win the match?
27a8f2b6-2220-4065-a3e1-acd4899fad9b.note: Four INDEPENDENTLY VERIFIED sources (Smarkets, Pinnacle API, Polymarket gamma-api, Oddschecker-via-jina) cluster 53.5-54.3% - tight, high-confidence cluster. Our model says 75% - LARGE divergence flagged for separate review.

5ce9274e-e6a2-4fba-9b30-a25aa3c65b02.question: Will BIH commit more fouls than Canada?
5ce9274e-e6a2-4fba-9b30-a25aa3c65b02.estimate: NO REAL MARKET FOUND across 3 sessions, ~25+ sites, including full enumeration of Smarkets' 208 markets. Confirmed structural gap.
5ce9274e-e6a2-4fba-9b30-a25aa3c65b02.old_confidence_note: previously flagged as effectively a ghost number - traced to unsourced search-summary claims

sources: ESPN site API per-match boxscores (fifa.worldq.uefa, VERIFIED_API, 5 matches)

CAN_fouls_per_match.note: ESPN fifa.friendly boxscores for Canada did not expose team-level fouls (only partial player stats) - footystats is the only fouls source for Canada

session4_real_data.model: Poisson(lambda_BIH=16.3) vs Poisson(lambda_CAN=12.2), independent, P(X_BIH > X_CAN)
session4_real_data.context_note: BIH away avg (17.2) > BIH home avg (15.25); CAN home avg (10.75) < CAN away avg (18.0, n=2 only). Canada is host nation playing at BMO Field (effectively home) - both context effects point toward WIDENING the BIH-Canada foul gap, i.e. raw 0.75 may even be conservative. However sample sizes are small (10 matches each) and foul counts are referee/game-state dependent (high variance, overdispersed).
session4_real_data.recommendation_rationale: Shrunk from raw Poisson model output (0.75) toward 0.50 to account for small-sample uncertainty in both team rates and referee variance not captured by independent-Poisson assumption. Two independent real sources (ESPN boxscores, footystats) agree closely on BIH's rate (16.2 vs 16.33) which is reassuring, but Canada's rate rests on a single source (footystats) only.

5ce9274e-e6a2-4fba-9b30-a25aa3c65b02.confidence: medium - now backed by 2 independent verified real-data sources for BIH and 1 for Canada, plus an explicit probability model (Poisson difference). Up from 'low/ghost-number'.

135f6145-c05f-465d-b078-56f142787754.question: Will there be 4+ total SOT in the 2nd half?
135f6145-c05f-465d-b078-56f142787754.old_confidence_note: previously flagged as effectively a ghost number - traced to unsourced search-summary claims (Sofascore 'Group B opener built on numbers')

BIH_SOT_per_match.source: ESPN site API per-match boxscores (fifa.worldq.uefa, VERIFIED_API, 5 matches)

CAN_SOT_per_match.estimate: ~4.0-4.2 (inferred: footystats 11.9 shots/match x ~33-35% SOT-conversion, the ratio observed in BIH's own shots->SOT data, since no direct Canada team SOT source found)
CAN_SOT_per_match.note: weakest link in the chain - Canada's SOT rate is inferred, not measured

session4_real_data.half_split_assumption: ~50-55% of shots/SOT occur in the 2nd half (generic league-wide heuristic - more fatigue/open play/chasing-the-game in 2H). Attempted to get a team-specific split via ESPN commentary/playbyplay feed for the same 5 BIH matches - DEAD END: ESPN's summary endpoint for this league has no timestamped shot-event commentary (only goals carry minutes; saves/blocks/off-target attempts are not in the feed). Other providers with full shot timelines (Sofascore/FotMob/WhoScored) are the same Cloudflare-blocked sites ruled out elsewhere in this research.

135f6145-c05f-465d-b078-56f142787754.confidence: medium-low - full-match SOT rate for BIH is now real (2 sources roughly agree: ESPN 5.4 vs the old unverified 6.33), Canada's SOT rate is inferred not measured, and the half-split is a generic heuristic not team-specific (confirmed dead end on getting a real split). Net: better-grounded than the old ghost number, but still has 2 soft assumptions.

18e552dd-4bfe-42de-84de-cddda65ee76c.question: At halftime, will the match be tied?

verified_corroboration.note: these are FULL-TIME draw probabilities (not HT), directionally useful but not a substitute - HT draws are typically MORE likely than FT draws in low-scoring games, consistent with Smarkets' HT estimate (0.457) being notably higher than the FT draw cluster (~0.27-0.28)

18e552dd-4bfe-42de-84de-cddda65ee76c.note: Still 1 direct HT-specific source (Smarkets). The 3 FT-draw numbers from VERIFIED sources are consistent in direction but answer a different question.

4764e2ed-3934-489e-89ba-c807860043bc.note: No corroborating 2nd-half team-goals market found anywhere across 3 sessions - confirmed structural gap, single-sourced.

9b567f11-be28-4cc0-9dc9-a38a4a3a9d80.question: Will Jonathan David score?

verified_corroboration.kalshi_score_or_assist_caveat: 0.33-0.41, but this is score-OR-assist (broader question, true scorer prob likely lower)

9b567f11-be28-4cc0-9dc9-a38a4a3a9d80.note: Smarkets (0.294-0.333) and Oddschecker-via-jina (0.345) are both VERIFIED and tightly clustered. Kalshi's score-or-assist props are a related-but-broader market. Good confidence around 0.30-0.35.

29bb38af-3c07-4c7b-a7fd-5742c6dba099.question: Will Edin Dzeko have 1+ SOT?
29bb38af-3c07-4c7b-a7fd-5742c6dba099.source: Smarkets player SOT (VERIFIED_API, offer-only, no bid - illiquid)

vs_Austria_2025-11-18.played: unclear - no individual stats found, likely rested

session4_real_data.interpretation: In the 2 matches he actually played meaningful minutes (both 'big' fixtures - playoff final vs Italy, must-win vs Romania), he recorded exactly 1 SOT each (100% in n=2). He's being rotated/rested against weaker sides (Wales, Cyprus - both of which BIH won/drew comfortably). Given this is BIH's World Cup OPENER (highest-stakes group game), the pattern strongly suggests he starts, similar to the Italy/Romania games. His 6 goals in 9 WCQ appearances (688 min) shows he's still BIH's primary central striker and focal point.
session4_real_data.recommendation_rationale: Real per-match data (n=2 meaningful appearances, both 1 SOT) is directionally consistent with and slightly supportive of the existing Smarkets 0.578 ask price. Small nudge up to 0.60 given his clear 'starts the big games' pattern and continued high involvement (6 goals/9 caps this campaign) - but n=2 is too small to move far from the market-derived number.

29bb38af-3c07-4c7b-a7fd-5742c6dba099.note: Confirmed single-sourced market across 3 sessions - no other site offers a Dzeko SOT prop specifically. One agent this session flagged an UNVERIFIED rumor that Dzeko may not be in the squad - real data above (6 goals in 9 WCQ caps this season, including the playoff final 3 weeks ago) makes that rumor look unlikely, but worth a final lineup check before submission given this market is illiquid (offer-only).

ad1e7582-0d8d-493f-8379-ad878e425d19.question: Penalty OR red card?
ad1e7582-0d8d-493f-8379-ad878e425d19.estimate: P(A)+P(B)-P(A)P(B) using A=0.310 (penalty mid), B=0.180 (red card mid) -> ~0.434
ad1e7582-0d8d-493f-8379-ad878e425d19.note: Penalty component remains single-sourced (Smarkets only) across all 3 sessions and ~25 sites - confirmed structural gap for that component.
